Notes.Text:
This image update for google/sles-sap-16-0-byos-v20260528-x86-64 contains the following changes:
Package dbus-broker was updated:

- Fix timeout on ssh due to not handling ESRCH (boo#1255678)  * fix-ESRCH-check.patch

Package google-sdk-container was updated:

Package nvme-cli was updated:

- Update to version 2.11+33.gf4fa5f36c:  * nvme-list: fix verbose JSON output for 'nvme list' command (bsc#1250332)
  * nvme-list: make verbose JSON output backward compatible (bsc#1250332)
  * nvme-list: fix verbose JSON output for 'nvme list' command
  * nvme: add output-format-version option
